title: QuickSnack
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''QuickSnacks''' were popular food bundles sold by the [[Biscuit Baron]] chain. They were also available in [[QuickSnackLite|lighter]] versions.

During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Biscuit Baron launched its month-long "Heroes of the Republic" campaign, which consisted of including commemorative [[Holocube/Legends|holocubes]] in QuickSnack bundles depicting notable historical figures of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] (including [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellors]] [[Anwis Eddicus]] and [[Vaila Pecivas]], and the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[S'diawae]], [[Ikrit]], and [[Jojighar]]).

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|business/13328_2.html|Biscuit Baron to Celebrate "Heroes of the Republic"}} {{1stm}}
